Software Engineer - Advanced Reporting

At Klaviyo, we value the unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives each Klaviyo brings to our workplace.

How you will make a difference:

  • Design and build advanced reporting features used by thousands of customers
  • Partner with product and design to ship end-to-end features

Skills Required

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
  • 5+ years of full-stack software engineering experience
